rationale: X independently verifies the exact reasoning the ground-truth reviewer gave (both submit_initial and submit_update reject list prompts regardless of already_submitted, confirming the guard removal is correct), and reaches the same APPROVE outcome as the actual two LGTMs, with concrete grounded file/line evidence. Y contradicts the actual outcome by recommending REQUEST CHANGES, hinges its 'major' findings on unverified/hedged assumptions (explicitly marked 'blocked'/'budget exhausted'), misses the specific already_submitted/StagePool reasoning the real reviewer gave, and pads output with triplicated identical text, all of which drag down precision and usefulness despite superficially specific file/line references.
